Repeating single digit decimal becomes exact ratio.

Postfix brackets become function call (arr index).

source:
define all? :: (a -> Bool) -> [a] -> Bool
  p xs -> True

define null? :: [a] -> Bool
  xs -> True

define ok :: [[Int]] -> Bool
  rows -> all? null? rows
expected: (define (all? [__p_0 : Fn] [__p_1 : Coll] -> Bool) (p xs -> True)) (define (null? [__p_0 : Coll] -> Bool) (xs -> True)) (define (ok [__p_0 : Coll] -> Bool) (rows -> (all? null? rows)))
